popularStory.description:

zh.lifeSummary: 當Robert Cross I於1612年6月26日出生在英國英格蘭薩默塞特哈林其時，他的父親Thomas Cross31歲，母親Rachel Anna Dising28歲。他於1635年8月20日與Anna Jordan在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼艾可易普斯維其結婚。他們至少是7個兒子和6個女兒的父母。他去世於1693年2月3日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼艾可易普斯維其享年80歲，埋葬在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼艾可易普斯維其。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Robert Cross I于1612年6月26日出生在英国英格兰薩默塞特哈林其时，他的父亲Thomas Cross31岁，母亲Rachel Anna Dising28岁。他于1635年8月20日与Anna Jordan在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼艾可易普斯維其结婚。他们至少是7个儿子和6个女儿的父母。他去世于1693年2月3日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼艾可易普斯維其享年80岁，埋葬在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼艾可易普斯維其。

nameMeanings.name: Cross
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: topographic name for someone who lived near a cross, such as one set up by the roadside or in a marketplace, from Middle English cros (Old English cros and Old Norse kross, ultimately from Latin crux, crucem). It is commonly Latinized in medieval records as ad crucem and de Cruce but examples of this can just as well belong to the synonymous but less common name Crouch . In a few cases the surname may have been given originally to someone who lived by a crossroads, but this sense of the word seems to have been a comparatively late development. In other cases, the surname (and its European cognates; see 3 below) may have denoted someone who carried the cross in processions of the Christian Church, but in English at least the usual word for this sense was Crozier .
Americanized form (translation into English) of various European surnames meaning ‘cross’ or ‘the cross’, such as French Lacroix , German Kreutz , and Slovenian and Croatian Križ (see Kriz ).

variants.name: Crouch
meanings: English (southeastern): from Middle English crouch(e), cruch(e) ‘cross’ (Old English crūc, ultimately from Latin crux, crucem; the Old English crūc was replaced in Middle English by the word cross, from Old Norse kross), applied as a topographic name for someone who lived by a cross.

variants.name: Croce
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Sal, Angelo, Carlo, Nicola, Salvatore, Vito, Antonio, Gino, Rocco, Saverio, Amadeo, Amerigo.

from croce ‘cross’ (from Latin crux, genitive crucis), applied as a topographic name for someone who lived by a roadside cross, or a nickname for someone who carried the cross in religious processions. Compare English Cross .

variants.name: Grose
meanings: Cornish: topographic name for someone who lived near a stone cross set up by the roadside or in a marketplace, Cornish crous (from Latin crux, crucis). Compare Cross .
English (of Norman origin): variant of   Gross  .

variants.name: Crosse
meanings: English and Irish: variant of   Cross  .

variants.name: Kreutz
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Kurt, Bernhard, Gottfried, Orlo, Reinhold.
German: topographic name for someone who lived near a cross set up by the roadside, in a marketplace, or as a field or boundary marker, from Middle High German kriuz(e) ‘cross’. Compare Cross .

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

historicEvents.title: The Pilgrims Board the Mayflower
historicEvents.description: "The Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower in search of religious freedom in the New World in September 1620. The Mayflower set sail from Plymouth, England, with 102 passengers, 40 of whom called themselves ""Saints."" After two stormy months at sea, the ship reached the New World. Nearly half of the group died during their first winter due to malnutrition and the harsh New England winter."

historicEvents.title: The English Civil War
historicEvents.description: A series of conflicts regarding England's governance during the years 1642 to 1651 is now known as The English Civil War. Charles I summoned supporters to join him against his enemies in Parliament. In October 1642, nearly 10,000 men fought for Charles I and chased Parliament across the River Tamar. Fighting continued for years and was finally ended at the Battle of Worcester on September 3, 1651, with a Parliamentarian victory.

historicEvents.title: Glorious Revolution
historicEvents.description: The Glorious Revolution brought the downfall of Catholic King James II and the reign of his Protestant daughter Mary and her Dutch husband, William III of Orange.

en.lifeSummary: When Robert Cross I was born on 26 June 1612, in Charlinch, Somerset, England, United Kingdom, his father, Thomas Cross, was 31 and his mother, Rachel Anna Dising, was 28. He married Anna Jordan on 20 August 1635, in Ipswich, Essex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. They were the parents of at least 7 sons and 6 daughters. He died on 3 February 1693, in Ipswich, Essex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, at the age of 80, and was buried in Ipswich, Essex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Robert Cross I est né le 26 juin 1612, à Charlinch, Somerset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Thomas Cross, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Rachel Anna Dising, avait 28 ans. Il a épousé Anna Jordan le 20 août 1635, à Ipswich, Essex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique. Ils ont eu au moins 7 fils et 6 filles. Il est décédé le 3 février 1693, à Ipswich, Essex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, à l’âge de 80 ans, et a été enterré à Ipswich, Essex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique.

de.lifeSummary: Als Robert Cross I am 26. Juni 1612 in Charlinch, Somerset, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Thomas Cross 31 und seine Mutter Rachel Anna Dising 28. Er hat am 20. August 1635 in Ipswich, Essex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America Anna Jordan geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 7 Söhne und 6 Töchter. Er starb am 3. it.lifeSummary: Quando Robert Cross I è nato il il 26 giugno 1612 nel Charlinch, Somerset, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Thomas Cross, aveva 31 anni e il suo madre, Rachel Anna Dising, aveva 28 anni. Lui sposato Anna Jordan il 20 agosto 1635, nel Ipswich, Essex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Erano genitori di almeno 7 figli e 6 figlie. Morì il 3 febbraio 1693, nel Ipswich, Essex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, all'età di 80 anni, e fu sepolto a Ipswich, Essex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.

ja.Ipswich, Massachusetts Bay, British Colo: イギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーイプスウィチ
ja.lifeSummary: Robert Cross Iが1612年6月26日にイギリスイギリスソメルセトチャーリンチで生まれた時，父Thomas Crossは31歳，母Rachel Anna Disingは28歳であった。1635年8月20日にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーエセックスイプスウィチでAnna Jordanと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも7人の息子と6人の娘の親であった。彼は1693年2月3日にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーエセックスイプスウィチで80歳で死去し，イギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーエセックスイプスウィチにて埋葬された。

ko.Rowley, Essex, Massachusetts Bay, Britis: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 에세스 로우리
ko.Ipswich, Essex, Massachusetts Bay Colony: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 에세스 이프스위치
ko.Ipswich, Essex, Massachusetts Bay, Briti: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 에세스 이프스위치
ko.Ipswich, Massachusetts Bay, British Colo: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 이프스위치
ko.lifeSummary: Robert Cross I(이)가 1612년 6월 26일 영국 잉글랜드 서머세트 찰린치에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Thomas Cross(은)는 31세였고, 그의 어머니 Rachel Anna Dising(은)는 28세였다. 그는 1635년 8월 20일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 에세스 이프스위치에서 Anna Jordan(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 일곱 명의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1693년 2월 3일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 에세스 이프스위치에서 80세의 나이로 사망했으며 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 에세스 이프스위치에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Robert Cross I nasceu em 26 de junho de 1612, em Charlinch, Somerset, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Thomas Cross, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, Rachel Anna Dising, tinha 28 anos. Ele casou-se com Anna Jordan em 20 de agosto de 1635, em Ipswich, Essex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Eles tiveram pelo menos 7 filhos e 6 filhas. Ele faleceu em 3 de fevereiro de 1693, em Ipswich, Essex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, com 80 anos, e foi sepultado em Ipswich, Essex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Robert Cross I родился 26 июня 1612 г. в местности чарлинч, сомирсет, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Thomas Cross было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Rachel Anna Dising, 28. Он женился на женщине по имени Anna Jordan 20 августа 1635 г. в местности ипсвич, эссекс, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика. У них было по крайней мере 7 сыновей и 6 дочерей. Он умер 3 февраля 1693 г. в местности ипсвич, эссекс, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 80 лет и был похоронен в местности ипсвич, эссекс, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Robert Cross I nació el 26 de junio de 1612, en Charlinch, Somerset, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Thomas Cross, tenía 31 años y su mamá, Rachel Anna Dising, tenía 28 años. Se casó con Anna Jordan el 20 de agosto de 1635, en Ipswich, Essex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Fueron padres de por lo menos 7 hijos y 6 hijas. Murió el 3 de febrero de 1693, en Ipswich, Essex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, a la edad de 80 años, y fue sepultado en Ipswich, Essex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.
